en: in Mexico, a little place on the Pacific Ocean.
You know what the Mexicans say about the Pacific?
ko: 멕시코 사람들이 태평양에 대해 뭐라고 하는지 알아?

en: No. They say it has no memory.
That's where I want to live the rest of my life,
a warm place with no memory, open up a little hotel
ko: 기억이 없는 따뜻한 곳, 해변에 작은 호텔을 열고

en: right on the beach, buy some worthless old boat
and fix it up new, take my guests out charter fishing.
ko: 새로 고쳐서 손님들을 낚시로 데려가고 싶어.

en: In a place like that, I could use a man that knows how to get things.
ko: 그런 곳에서는 일을 잘 아는 사람이 필요해.

en: I don't think I could make it on the outside.
ko: 나는 밖에서 잘 지낼 수 있을 것 같지 않아.
